features: 【 Elegant 70th Birthday Celebration】Celebrate in style with our black & gold 70th birthday banner decoration, perfect for honoring 70 wonderful years. Ideal for both men and women born in 1955, this premium decoration adds glamour to any milestone party

【 Large & Premium Quality】This 70th birthday party supply measures 180x110cm (70.8"x43.3") and is made from durable 100D polyester. It features vibrant, fade-resistant printing that showcases iconic 1955 UK pop culture references for lasting memories

【 Nostalgic 1955 UK Timeline】Relive special memories with printed highlights of 1955 - hit songs, blockbuster films, UK landmarks, sports events and fascinating facts about prices and population trends. Make this born in 1955 UK birthday background banner a perfect conversation starter at parties

【 Quick & Secure Setup】This 70th birthday decoration features four reinforced corner holes and includes hanging ropes for easy installation. You can effortlessly attach it to walls, fences, or photo booths to instantly transform your party space. The lightweight and machine washable fabric folds neatly for compact storage, making it perfect for repeated use at future celebrations

【 Versatile Vintage Decor】Perfect as a photo backdrop, wall decor or cake table display. Complements all 70th birthday party themes and pairs beautifully with balloons and streamers. Beyond birthdays, this born in 1955 UK backdrop sign in poster ideal for anniversaries, family gathering, class reunions and retro-themed parties
